'''Lekk Bazak''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] who gallivanted the edges of [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]] with a small crew of Rodians and [[Human/Legends|Humans]] known in some circles as [[Bazak's Gang]]. He was affiliated with the [[Nalmar Family|Nalmar crime family]].
